statements.text: Accumulate capital project costs before capitalization and capitalize sub-assets individually upon commissioning.
statements.rationale: Prevent premature asset recognition and GL errors

statements.text: Track lease contracts with automatic IFRS 16 right-of-use and liability calculations on commencement and modification.
statements.rationale: Ensure lease accounting compliance

module_sme_rollup.name: Maintenance Execution
module_sme_rollup.description: Plan, schedule, and execute preventive and corrective maintenance with work order and spare parts management.

statements.text: Auto-generate work orders from preventive maintenance plans on time-based, usage-based, or condition-based triggers.
statements.rationale: Reduce unplanned downtime and extend asset life

statements.text: Create work orders for corrective, preventive, inspection, and project maintenance with configurable approval workflows.
statements.rationale: Enforce governance and prevent unauthorized work

statements.text: Assign work orders to technicians or contractors with labour time tracking, parts reservation, and cost allocation.
statements.rationale: Enable resource planning and maintenance cost visibility

statements.text: Track work order status through draft, approved, in-progress, completed, closed with failure codes and root-cause analysis.
statements.rationale: Support reliability engineering and trend analysis

statements.text: Maintain spare parts catalogue with alternate parts, multi-storeroom inventory, reorder alerts, and consumption forecasting.
statements.rationale: Prevent stockouts and optimize inventory investment

statements.text: Enable non-maintenance users to submit service requests via portal with triage conversion to work orders and status notifications.
statements.rationale: Improve request visibility and response accountability

module_sme_rollup.name: Field Operations and Compliance
module_sme_rollup.description: Enable mobile field work, offline operations, and regulatory compliance with real-time visibility.

statements.text: Technicians scan barcodes, capture photos and signatures, and execute task checklists on iOS/Android with offline sync.
statements.rationale: Reduce paperwork and enable remote work

statements.text: Pre-download assets and work orders for offline execution; auto-sync and resolve conflicts when connectivity returns.
statements.rationale: Enable continuous operations in low-connectivity environments

statements.text: Schedule regulatory inspections with due dates, track compliance certificates with expiry alerts, and record audit trails.
statements.rationale: Prevent regulatory violations and penalties

statements.text: Execute inspections using configurable checklists with pass/fail outcomes, remedial tracking, and safety incident linkage.
statements.rationale: Ensure consistent compliance and incident traceability

statements.text: Track OT asset patch levels, firmware versions, CVE status, and security incidents with approval workflows and audit trail.
statements.rationale: Reduce cybersecurity risk and operational technology vulnerabilities

module_sme_rollup.name: Analytics and Optimization
module_sme_rollup.description: Monitor asset performance, maintenance effectiveness, and reliability with actionable dashboards and KPIs.

statements.text: Calculate and report MTBF, MTTR, maintenance backlog, schedule compliance, and OEE by asset and class.
statements.rationale: Identify performance trends and maintenance effectiveness

statements.text: Report planned versus unplanned maintenance ratio and maintenance cost per asset by labour, parts, and contractor spend.
statements.rationale: Optimize maintenance strategy and budget allocation

statements.text: Analyze downtime by failure code and root cause with configurable dashboards and trend analysis.
statements.rationale: Enable data-driven reliability improvements

statements.text: Calculate remaining useful life, model multi-year capital plans, and rank replacement candidates by risk and cost.
statements.rationale: Guide strategic asset investment decisions

statements.text: Record energy consumption and carbon emissions per asset; aggregate to enterprise level and flag consumption variances.
statements.rationale: Support sustainability reporting and cost reduction

module_sme_rollup.name: Platform and Integration
module_sme_rollup.description: Secure data governance, user access control, and seamless integration with enterprise systems.

statements.text: Encrypt asset data at rest and in transit; maintain immutable audit trail with user identity, timestamp, and change details.
statements.rationale: Ensure data security and regulatory compliance

statements.text: Assign role-based access by asset location, department, or cost centre; enforce two-factor authentication and SSO integration.
statements.rationale: Prevent unauthorized access and ensure accountability

statements.text: Import asset registers from CSV/Excel; export data to standard formats; post depreciation and costs to GL or ERP systems.
statements.rationale: Enable data migration and financial system synchronization

statements.text: Provide RESTful API for custom integrations; schedule automated backups and exports; display consolidated ERP dashboards.
statements.rationale: Support third-party integrations and business continuity

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your asset data is accessible, secure, and connected across your organisation. Your maintenance teams can work from phones on-site, your finance team can pull depreciation reports, and sensitive asset information stays protected under Singapore's PDPA rules. It matters when a technician needs to check an asset history from a job site, or when you need to prove compliance to an auditor.

Asset Register & Lifecycle.narrative: This is your single source of truth for every machine, vehicle, and piece of equipment your company owns—from purchase through retirement. Singapore SMEs need this to track depreciation for tax filings, manage lease obligations, and know what assets you actually have. It's critical when you're preparing financial statements or deciding whether to repair or replace an aging piece of equipment.

Maintenance Operations.narrative: This family turns maintenance from reactive firefighting into planned, efficient work. You schedule preventive maintenance before breakdowns happen, technicians execute jobs from their phones with checklists and photos, and spare parts are always in stock when needed. It matters when a production line goes down unexpectedly and costs you thousands per hour, or when you're trying to reduce unplanned downtime by 30%.

Reliability & Compliance.narrative: This family keeps your assets safe, compliant, and healthy by capturing condition data and managing mandatory inspections and certifications. Singapore SMEs in manufacturing, facilities, or transport must meet regulatory and insurer requirements; this family automates compliance tracking and alerts you before certificates expire. It matters when a safety inspector visits, or when you need to prove that critical equipment was inspected on schedule.

Capital & Commercial.narrative: This family links your asset purchases and upgrades to the asset register, tracks warranty claims so repairs go to the right vendor, and monitors energy costs per asset. Singapore SMEs benefit by avoiding duplicate warranty claims, controlling energy spend, and understanding the true cost of ownership. It matters when you're deciding whether to buy or lease new equipment, or when you want to cut energy bills by identifying inefficient assets.

Analytics & Intelligence.narrative: This family gives you dashboards and reports on maintenance performance, asset health, and downtime trends so you can make data-driven decisions. Singapore SMEs use these insights to spot problem assets early, benchmark maintenance costs, and justify investment in new equipment. It matters when your CFO asks 'which assets are costing us the most to maintain?' or when you want to prove that preventive maintenance is saving money.
